---
toc: false
---

::: {style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; min-height: 65vh; text-align: center; max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto;"}

# REFLECTION

Throughout this module, I have gained substantial confidence in bridging the gap between raw data and actionable insights.

### Key Takeaways
**1. Version Control**: Getting comfortable with Git and GitHub has dramatically improved my workflow.  
**2. Reproducible Research**: Using Quarto to blend Python code directly with my reports ensures my analysis is transparent and easily updatable.  
**3. Data Visualization**: I learned how crucial narrative pacing and visual clarity are when presenting findings to non-technical stakeholders.

:::
